messages.content: translate all given japanese to english
I'm sorry, but there is no given Japanese text for me to translate to English. Please provide the Japanese text so that I can assist you with the translation.

ベザスタ：
はぁ！？　たったこれだけ！？
俺は死ぬ思いして討伐してきたんだぜ！？

Bezasta:
Huh?! Is that all?
I risked my life to defeat it, you know!?

ベザスタ：
これっぽっちの報酬じゃ割に合わねえよ！！
ポーションも全部使い切っちまったし、武器も装備も
ボロボロで……

Bezasta:
This little reward is not worth it!!
I completely used up all my potions and my equipment...
My weapons are worn out and I'm all battered up...

ベザスタ：
こんなんじゃ、次の装備もマトモに買えやしねえ。
どう責任とってくれんだよ！？

Bezasta:
With this, I won't even be able to buy decent equipment for next time.
How are you going to take responsibility for this!?

ギルド受付：
は、はぁ……そう言われましても、
それが規定の報酬ですし……

Guild Receptionist:
U-Um... even if you say that,
it is the designated reward...
